info.title: Zoho CRM Related Records API
info.description: RESTful API for managing relationships between CRM records across different modules. Provides comprehensive operations for retrieving, updating, and delinking related records with support for bulk operations, field filtering, and pagination. Supports all standard CRM modules including Contacts, Leads, Deals, Accounts, Products, and custom modules.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of records from a specific related list of a parent record in a CRM module. Supports filtering by fields and conditional requests using If-Modified-Since header.

200.description: Successfully retrieved related records with comprehensive pagination metadata and field data.

schema.description: Response containing related records data with pagination metadata

data.description: Array of related record objects with requested fields

items.description: Individual related record with dynamic CRM fields

id.description: Unique identifier of the related record

Created_Time.description: Timestamp when the record was created

Modified_Time.description: Timestamp when the record was last modified

Moved_To__s.description: Stage value to which the record was moved (stage history / picklist movement).

count.description: Number of records in current response

more_records.description: Indicates if more pages are available

next_page_token.description: Token to retrieve the next page of results

page_token_expiry.description: Expiration timestamp for the page token

previous_page_token.description: Token to retrieve the previous page of results

204.description: No related records found for the specified parent record

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication credentials

403.description: Permission denied to read related records

404.description: Not Found - Parent record or related list does not exist

put.description: Updates multiple related records' specific properties in a specified related list.

schema.description: Request payload for updating multiple related records

data.description: Array of records to update with their IDs and field values

items.description: Individual record update with ID and fields to modify

id.description: Unique identifier of the record to update

207.description: Multi-Status - Bulk update processed with mixed results (some updated, some failed).

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication credentials

403.description: Permission denied to read related records

404.description: Not Found - INVALID_URL_PATTERN: Please check if the URL trying to access is a correct one. Resolution: The request URL specified is incorrect. Specify a valid request URL. Refer to request URL section above. (Or) the specified parent/related record does not exist.

delete.description: Removes relationships between a parent record and multiple records in a specified related list, identified by their IDs in the query parameter. This operation deletes only the relationship links, not the actual records themselves. The target records remain intact in their respective modules.

207.description: Multi-Status - Bulk delink processed with mixed results (some relations removed, some failed).

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication credentials

403.description: Permission denied to delete related records

404.description: Not Found - Parent record or related records do not exist

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific record that is related to a parent record. Returns the record data along with pagination information if applicable.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the specific related record

schema.description: Response containing a single related record with metadata

data.description: Array containing the single related record

items.description: Related record object with requested fields

id.description: Unique identifier of the related record

Created_Time.description: Timestamp when the record was created

Modified_Time.description: Timestamp when the record was last modified

Moved_To__s.description: Stage value to which the record was moved (stage history / picklist movement).

204.description: No related records found for the specified parent record

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication credentials

403.description: Permission denied to read related records

404.description: Not Found - Record does not exist

put.description: Updates a specific related record's properties.

schema.description: Request payload for updating a related record

data.description: Array containing the record to update

items.description: Record update with ID and fields to modify

id.description: Unique identifier of the record to update

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication credentials

403.description: Permission denied to read related records

404.description: Not Found - Record does not exist

delete.description: Deletes the association between a parent record and a specific related record. This operation deletes only the relationship link, not the actual record itself.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication credentials

403.description: Permission denied to delete related records

404.description: Not Found - Record does not exist or relationship not found

get.description: Retrieves a list of records that were previously related to a parent record but have since been deleted. Useful for audit trails and data recovery scenarios.

schema.description: Response containing deleted related records with metadata

data.description: Array of deleted related record references

items.description: Deleted record reference with basic metadata

id.description: Unique identifier of the deleted record

Created_Time.description: Timestamp when the record was created

Modified_Time.description: Timestamp when the record was last modified

Moved_To__s.description: Stage value to which the record was moved (stage history / picklist movement).

count.description: Number of records in current response

more_records.description: Indicates if more pages are available

next_page_token.description: Token to retrieve the next page of results

page_token_expiry.description: Expiration timestamp for the page token

previous_page_token.description: Token to retrieve the previous page of results

204.description: No related records found for the specified parent record

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication credentials

403.description: Permission denied to read related records

404.description: Not Found - Parent record does not exist

ParentRecordModule.name: parentRecordModule
ParentRecordModule.description: The module name of the parent record (e.g., Contacts, Leads, Deals, Accounts, Services__s, Price_Books)

ParentRecord.name: parentRecord
ParentRecord.description: The unique identifier of the parent record. Must be a valid numeric record ID.

RelatedList.name: relatedList
RelatedList.description: The name of the related list (module) containing the records to retrieve or modify

Record.name: record
Record.description: The unique identifier of the specific related record. Must be a valid numeric record ID.

Ids.name: ids
Ids.description: Comma-separated list of record IDs to delink from the parent record. Each ID must be numeric.

Fields.name: fields
Fields.description: Comma-separated list of field names to include in the response. Field names must follow API naming conventions.

PerPage.name: perPage
PerPage.description: Number of records to return per page

IfModifiedSince.name: If-Modified-Since
IfModifiedSince.description: Only return records modified after this timestamp (RFC 2822 format)

PageToken.name: page_token
PageToken.description: Token for fetching the next set of records after 2000. Use the value from 'next_page_token' in the previous response.

IdsOptional.name: ids
IdsOptional.description: Comma-separated list of record IDs to retrieve.

SortBy.name: sort_by
SortBy.description: Field to sort records by. Allowed: id, Created_Time, Modified_Time.

InvalidModuleError.description: Error response for invalid module name.

code.description: Error code indicating the type of error.

resource_path_index.description: Index of the path parameter that caused the error (0-based).

InvalidDataError.description: Error response for INVALID_DATA (invalid IDs, invalid related list/relation name, hidden related list in layout, invalid input, etc.).

details.description: Additional error details. Can be empty depending on the error.

id.description: Record/related record ID involved in the error (if applicable).

api_name.description: API name of the field/module/related list involved (if applicable).

resource_path_index.description: Index/position in the request resource path or payload where the error occurred (if applicable).

permissions.description: Missing/required permissions for the requested operation

InternalError.description: Error response for internal server error.

InvalidTokenError.description: Error response for invalid authentication token.

RecordNotFoundError.description: Error response for record not found.

InvalidRequestMethodError.description: Error response for invalid HTTP request method.

NotSupportedError.description: Error response for modules not supported in the API.

code.description: Error code indicating the type of error.

resource_path_index.description: Index of the path parameter that caused the error (0-based).

UnableToParseDataTypeError.description: Error response for wrong format in request body or parameters.

MandatoryNotFoundError.description: Error response for missing required parameter.

param_name.description: Name of the missing mandatory parameter (if applicable).

api_name.description: API name of the missing mandatory field (if applicable).

json_path.description: JSONPath to the missing field in request payload (if applicable).

RequiredParamMissingError.description: Error response for missing required parameter.

param_name.description: Name of the missing required parameter.

BulkOperationResponse.description: Response structure for bulk operations (update, delete)

data.description: Array of operation results per record

details.description: Operation details including affected record ID

api_name.description: API name of the field that caused the error (if applicable).

json_path.description: JSONPath to the field in request payload (if applicable).

param_name.description: Parameter name that caused the error (if applicable).

InvalidUrlPatternError.description: Error response when the request URL pattern is incorrect.

OAuthScopeMismatchError.description: Error response when the access token does not have the required OAuth scope for this API call.

RelationNotFoundBulkError.description: Error response for relation not found in bulk operations with data array wrapper.

id.description: ID of the record for which relation was not found

api_name.description: API name of the field that caused the error

json_path.description: JSONPath to the field in request payload

MandatoryNotFoundBulkError.description: Error response for mandatory field not found in bulk operations with data array wrapper.

api_name.description: API name of the mandatory field that is missing

json_path.description: JSONPath to the missing field in request payload

LimitExceededError.description: Error response when the number of items exceeds the allowed limit.

details.description: Additional error details including limit information.

param_name.description: Name of the parameter that exceeded the limit

iam-oauth2-schema.description: OAuth 2.0 authentication for Zoho CRM APIs
